---
title: "Yucheng Chen"
image: images/yuchengchen_2025.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: "Yucheng__Chen@163.com"
      href: "mailto:Yucheng__Chen@163.com"
    - icon: phone
      text: "18759135762"
      href: "tel:18759135762"
    - icon: brands zhihu
      text: "知乎"
      href: "https://www.zhihu.com/people/chen-yu-cheng-67-47"  
---

::: {#hero-heading .profile-card .fade-in}

# Yucheng Chen

Born in December 2003, undergraduate student in Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Robotics Direction) at Huazhong University of Science and Technology, expected to graduate in June 2026. Admitted to Shanghai Jiao Tong University for master's degree in Control Science and Engineering starting from September 2026.

:::

::: {.card .fade-in .delay-1}
## Personal Information & Education Background
### Personal Information
- Date of Birth: December 2003
- Phone: 18759135762
- Email: Yucheng__Chen@163.com
- English Level: CET-6 (504 points)
- Personal Website: https://wangyicyc.github.io/YuchengChen.github.io

### Education Background
- **2022.09 – 2026.06**  
  **Huazhong University of Science and Technology (985)**  
  Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Robotics Direction) | Bachelor's degree (Senior year)
  - Weighted GPA: 90/100 (Top 10% in major)
  - Core course grades:
    - Calculus (I/II): 93 / 95  |  Linear Algebra: 91  |  Complex Variables and Integral Transforms: 93
    - Theoretical Mechanics: 96  |  Probability Theory and Mathematical Statistics: 96  |  Comprehensive English: 93
- **2026.09 – TBD**  
  **Shanghai Jiao Tong University (Admitted for postgraduate study)**  
  Control Science and Engineering (Master's degree)

### Contact
- Email: Yucheng__Chen@163.com
- Phone: 18759135762
- Zhihu: [Chen Yucheng](https://www.zhihu.com/people/chen-yu-cheng-67-47)
:::

::: {.card .fade-in .delay-2}
## Internship
### 2025.12.10 - Present
- **Robosense** | Reinforcement Learning Algorithm Intern  
- **Project**: Tennis Ball-catching Cart Reinforcement Learning Model Training and Deployment
- **Main Work**:  
  1. **Training of Reinforcement Learning Model**: In the Isaac Gym training environment, the PPO algorithm was implemented based on the rsl_rl reinforcement learning library to train the car to complete the automatic control task of tennis reception.  
  2. **Simulation Environment Migration**: Transferring the original simulation environment based on Isaac Gym to the more high-fidelity MujocoLab (taking into account the high-fidelity feature of Mujoco and the GPU parallel computing capability)
  3. **Research on Sim2Real Gap**: The model was deployed from the virtual training environment to the real physical environment and verified to validate its performance in the real environment.  
  4. **Design of Tennis Simulator**: During the training process, the dynamics model of the tennis was independently designed in the simulation environment, and an optimizer was designed to optimize the parameters based on the real trajectory data.  
 
   
## Project Experience
### Adaptive MPC Controller Based on Reinforcement Learning (PPO)
**Project Leader**｜2025.12 – now  
**Project Description**：Combine reinforcement learning with model predictive control technology to enhance UAV flight robustness in complex environments, especially for scenarios with disturbed positioning information  
**Key Contributions**：  
  1. **Algorithm Integration**：Integrated Actor-Critic reinforcement learning algorithm with MPC controller, using reinforcement learning to adaptively adjust the cost function of MPC, enhancing the system's ability to adapt to environmental changes  
  2. **Model Training**：Conducted reinforcement learning training using PPO algorithm, constructing Actor-Critic models with MLP network structure  
  3. **Differentiable MPC**：Adopted differentiable MPC framework, incorporating MPC's optimization process into the reinforcement learning training pipeline  
  4. **C++ and Python Integration**：Implemented differentiable MPC controller in C++ and integrated it into reinforcement learning training (Python), improving training and model inference efficiency  

### Wind-Disturbed UAV Target Search and Delivery  
**Project Leader**｜2024.05 – 2024.10  
**Project Description**：Outdoor environment: UAV carrying a 1.5L mineral water bottle autonomously flew on an 8m*80m runway, performing the following tasks:  
1. UAV autonomously took off from the designated takeoff point  
2. Searched for white barrels for delivery in an 8*5m area 30m away from the takeoff point, with three white barrels (diameters: 30, 20, 15 cm) - smaller diameter barrels scored higher  
3. Reconnoitered dangerous objects in an 8*5 area 65m away from the takeoff point and remotely transmitted data for team members to fill in at the console  
4. After completing the above tasks, UAV autonomously returned to the takeoff point and landed  
**Key Contributions**：  
1. **Fuzzy PID Controller (C++)**: Implemented fuzzy rules to adaptively adjust PID coefficients for precise control of UAVs under wind disturbances  
2. **Path Planning Algorithm VFH**: Solved current feasible points based on VFH algorithm and generated smooth paths through B-spline curve optimization  
3. **Filter Algorithm Deployment**: Combined Kalman filter and low-pass filter to remove noise and smooth controller output  

### Obstacle Forest Express Delivery UAV  
**Project Leader**｜2023.10 – 2024.05  
**Project Description**：Indoor environment: UAV carrying 3×100g express boxes performed tasks in a 10×10m area, including:  
  1. Autonomous takeoff from the takeoff point  
  2. Searching for 5 existing targets in a 10×8.5m area for delivery, with delivery scores calculated based on delivery accuracy and target weights, while avoiding dense obstacles in the area  
  3. After completing task 2, proceeding to the entrance of a 10×1.5m corridor, traversing the corridor to reach the landing point for accurate landing, with two 80cm-wide narrow passages in the corridor  
**Key Contributions**：  
  1. **ROS-based Flight Code (C++)**: Implemented obstacle avoidance and delivery tasks in obstacle forest and narrow corridor environments  
  2. **Localization and Path Generation**: Deployed FAST-LIO and Ego-Planner for UAV localization and feasible route generation, with MPC controller tracking paths for obstacle avoidance  
  3. **MPC Controller (C++)**: Computed control inputs for UAV acceleration online based on target points and constraints to track global paths  

:::

::: {.card .fade-in .delay-3}
## Research Interests & Professional Skills
### Research Interests
- Optimal Control
- Path Planning
- Reinforcement Learning

### Professional Skills
- **Robot Operating System**: Proficient in ROS, familiar with Ubuntu command line and Gazebo simulation  
- **Reinforcement Learning Algorithms**: Familiar with Actor-Critic, TRPO, PPO, SAC, DDPG, etc.  
- **Robotics Fundamentals**: Mastered IK (Inverse Kinematics), rotation matrices, quaternions, etc.  
- **Optimal Control Methods**: Familiar with LQR, MPC, iLQR, DDP controllers
:::

::: {.card .fade-in .delay-4}
## Awards and Honors

- **China Robot Competition and ROBOCUP Robot World Cup China Selection**  
  - National Second Prize (2023)  
  - National Third Prize (2024)  
- **China University Student Aircraft Design Innovation Competition**  
  - Individual/Team First Prize (2023)  
- **Scholarships**  
  - Jiyuan Scholarship (2023.10)  
  - Academic Excellence Scholarship (2023.10)  
  - Freshman Academic Excellence Scholarship (2023.03)
:::
